use_cases: Landing page about section showcasing app features with visual icons
Product feature overview displayed in a responsive grid layout
Company value proposition display for SaaS applications
Feature highlight section for portfolio or showcase pages
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist about section component displaying product features in a responsive card grid. Features include icon badges with emoji imagery, feature titles, and descriptions with a soft pastel color scheme using indigo accents and a blurred yellow background glow effect. The layout adapts from single column on mobile to three-column grid on desktop.
